data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding linked resources and window context for every assignment.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'linked resource and window context for every assignment'. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or confirmations regarding these linked resources or their contexts. The linked use case mentions the need for these elements, but without concrete evidence, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of linked resources and window context for every assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
